Data Privacy Notice (R.A. 10173)
By saving this recipient's information, you acknowledge that personal data collected is for legitimate health service purposes and will be protected under the Data Privacy Act of 2012. The data will only be used within the MediSync system for dispensing and record-keeping purposes.
